caption:
A plumber we work with thought an AI receptionist was a gimmick.

So we didn't argue — we started tiny. It only answered the calls he always missed anyway: after 6pm and weekends. Week one it booked jobs he'd never have seen. Soon after he said: "Put it on everything."

Now it answers every call — day, night, mid-job — and he turns up to work that's already booked.

Sceptical too? Start with after-hours. Free audit — link in bio. 👇

#plumber #plumbinguk #tradesbusiness #ukandireland #aireceptionist
